note: Every engagement starts with a short discovery call so we can size the work, agree on scope, and recommend the right paid engagement.

tiers.description: Dedicated technical guidance delivered through focused sessions. We review your architecture, identify risks and opportunities, and provide written recommendations with clear next steps. Ideal for vetting decisions, modernization planning, compliance readiness, or resolving complex infrastructure challenges.

Well-defined projects delivered with complete documentation. All code arrives via pull request with comprehensive runbooks. A detailed proposal is agreed upfront so there are no surprises. Examples: CI/CD pipeline setup, infrastructure-as-code, containerization, cloud migrations, compliance hardening, or deployment automation.
features: All code delivered via pull request

tiers.description: Reliable hands-on engineering every week with consistent capacity and same-day response times. Shift priorities week-to-week based on what matters most. Ideal for ongoing optimization, feature development, infrastructure scaling, technical debt reduction, or keeping cloud infrastructure lean and efficient.
features: Flexible scope — shift priorities week to week
